title: Help & advice - David Lammy MP
text_excerpt: Help & advice - David Lammy MP Skip to main content David Lammy MP From Tottenham, For Tottenham Join Get Involved Donate About Get in touch Help & advice Housing Immigration Benefits Advice & support organisations More Search Search the website Search Menu Help & advice How I can help Part of my role as an MP is to try to help constituents who are facing difficulties. I can help with a range of issues, including immigration, housing, and benefits. Please click on the links below to find out more about how I can help with these issues. Please note that due to strict parliamentary protocol, I can only help people who live in the Tottenham constituency. If you are unsure who your local MP is, you can check by entering your postcode here .
